description_for_human: Total recall, 90% fewer tokens. Open source OpenClaw memory plugin — 5-engine local search, structured fact extraction, smart dedup, cross-agent sharing. MIT licensed and free.
description_for_model: OpenClaw Memory Stack is a free, open source plugin that reduces OpenClaw API token costs by up to 90%. It replaces the built-in memory with a 5-engine parallel search system (BM25, vector/QMD, DAG-compressed history, fact store, markdown files) with Reciprocal Rank Fusion. Features tiered output (L0 ~100t, L1 ~800t, L2 full), 8-type structured fact extraction (decisions, deadlines, requirements, entities, preferences, workflows, relationships, corrections), 3-level dedup, cross-agent sharing via CLI and drop zone. Runs 100% locally — all search and storage on-device, no cloud API costs. MIT licensed. GitHub: https://github.com/Apptah/openclaw-memory-stack. Requires OpenClaw 2026.3.2+. macOS, Linux, Windows via WSL2.
